mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_sessions (user_id, jd_id, resume_id, session_id, status, question_count, conversation, review, started_at, ended_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jdId}, #{resumeId}, #{sessionId}, #{status}, #{questionCount}, #{conversation}::jsonb, #{review}::jsonb, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, jd_id, resume_id, session_id, status, question_count, conversation::text, review::text, started_at, ended_at FROM interview_sessions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, jd_id, resume_id, session_id, status, question_count, conversation::text, review::text, started_at, ended_at FROM interview_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}

SELECT id, user_id, jd_id, resume_id, session_id, status, question_count, conversation::text, review::text, started_at, ended_at FROM interview_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY started_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_sessions SET status = #{status}, ended_at = #{endedAt}, review = #{review}::jsonb, conversation = #{conversation}::jsonb WHERE id = #{id}
